title: Romantic Creamy Oats Stir-fry
description: A herbal and creamy Algerian-inspired dish featuring ground oats in a light sauce with no eggs, perfect for breakfast or dessert.

ingredients.name: 1 small bell pepper, diced (any color)
ingredients.notes: optional for extra crunch and flavor

instructions: Heat olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add onions and bell peppers if using, sauté until soft about 3 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for another minute until fragrant.
Stir in ground cumin and coriander, cooking for 1-2 minutes to release the flavors.
Pour in vegetable broth or water, then add heavy cream. Bring it to a simmer.
Incorporate oatmeal into the sauce and stir well to combine. Let cook until thickened, about 5 minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper as needed.
Serve hot garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
